message: ci: refresh apt indexes before swiftly post-install

files.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,7 @@ jobs:
 
           swiftly install 6.2.1 --use --assume-yes --post-install-file "$POST_INSTALL_SCRIPT"
           if [[ -s "$POST_INSTALL_SCRIPT" ]]; then
+            sudo apt-get update
             sudo bash "$POST_INSTALL_SCRIPT"
           fi

@@ -55,6 +55,7 @@ jobs:
 
           swiftly install 6.2.1 --use --assume-yes --post-install-file "$POST_INSTALL_SCRIPT"
           if [[ -s "$POST_INSTALL_SCRIPT" ]]; then
+            sudo apt-get update
             sudo bash "$POST_INSTALL_SCRIPT"
           fi
